query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_LENGTH(forms) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as withForms, SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_CONTAINS(forms, '{"hasPasswordField": true}') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as withLoginForms, SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_LENGTH(externalLinks) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as withExtLinks, SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_LENGTH(detectedTechnologies) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as withTech FROM web_crawl_results
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2k2SuDvpDb6F44q.5f28f8362a85 --database VmWWcXQYZJYuALRdNNvsC2 --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_LENGTH(forms) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as withForms, SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_CONTAINS(forms, '{"hasPasswordField": true}') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as withLoginForms, SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_LENGTH(externalLinks) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as withExtLinks, SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_LENGTH(detectedTechnologies) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as withTech FROM web_crawl_results
